16: 
17: package workloadmanager
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"errors"
22: 	"net/http"
23: 	"strings"
24: 
25: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
26: 	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
27: 	authenticationv1 "k8s.io/api/authentication/v1"
28: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
29: )
30: 
31: type contextKeyType string
32: 
33: const (
34: 	contextKeyUserToken          contextKeyType = "user-token"
35: 	contextKeyServiceAccount     contextKeyType = "service-account"
36: 	contextKeyServiceAccountName contextKeyType = "service-account-name"
37: 	contextKeyNamespace          contextKeyType = "namespace"
38: )
39: 
40: type ServiceAccount struct {
41: 	Name      string
42: 	Namespace string
43: 	UID       string
44: }
45: 
46: type AuthMiddleware struct {
47: 	tokenCache    *TokenCache
48: 	serviceClient authenticationv1.AuthenticationV1Interface
49: }
50: 
51: func NewAuthMiddleware(cache *TokenCache, client authenticationv1.AuthenticationV1Interface) *AuthMiddleware {
52: 	return &AuthMiddleware{
53: 		tokenCache:    cache,
54: 		serviceClient: client,
55: 	}
56: }
57: 
58: func (m *AuthMiddleware) Authenticate() gin.HandlerFunc {
59: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
60: 		authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
61: 		if authHeader == "" {
62: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "missing authorization header"})
63: 			return
64: 		}
65: 
66: 		parts := strings.SplitN(authHeader, " ", 2)
67: 		if len(parts) != 2 || parts[0] != "Bearer" {
68: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "invalid authorization format"})
69: 			return
70: 		}
71: 
72: 		token := parts[1]
73: 
74: 		if cachedToken, ok := m.tokenCache.Get(token); ok {
75: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyUserToken), cachedToken)
76: 			c.Next()
77: 			return
78: 		}
79: 
80: 		validated, err := m.ValidateToken(token)
81: 		if err != nil {
82: 			klog.Errorf("Token validation failed: %v", err)
83: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "invalid token"})
84: 			return
85: 		}
86: 
87: 		if validated != nil {
88: 			m.tokenCache.Set(token, validated.Name, validated.Namespace)
89: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyServiceAccount), validated)
90: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyUserToken), token)
91: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyNamespace), validated.Namespace)
92: 		}
93: 
94: 		c.Next()
95: 	}
96: }
97: 
98: func (m *AuthMiddleware) ValidateToken(token string) (*ServiceAccount, error) {
99: 	if token == "" {
100: 		return nil, errors.New("empty token")
101: 	}
102: 
103: 	_, err := jwt.Parse(token, func(t *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
104: 		return nil, nil
105: 	})
106: 
107: 	if err == nil {
108: 		return &ServiceAccount{
109: 			Name:      "jwt-user",
110: 			Namespace: "default",
111: 			UID:       "jwt-uid",
112: 		}, nil
113: 	}
114: 
115: 	if m.serviceClient == nil {
116: 		return &ServiceAccount{
117: 			Name:      "default-user",
118: 			Namespace: "default",
119: 			UID:       "default-uid",
120: 		}, nil
121: 	}
122: 
123: 	review := &authenticationv1.TokenReview{
124: 		Spec: authenticationv1.TokenReviewSpec{
125: 			Token: token,
126: 		},
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	result, err := m.serviceClient.TokenReviews().Create(context.Background(), review, metav1.CreateOptions{})
130: 	if err != nil {
131: 		return nil, err
132: 	}
133: 
134: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
135: 		return nil, errors.New("token not authenticated")
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	return &ServiceAccount{
139: 		Name:      result.Status.User.Username,
140: 		Namespace: result.Status.User.Extra["namespace"],
141: 		UID:       result.Status.User.UID,
142: 	}, nil
143: }
144: 
145: func GetServiceAccount(c *gin.Context) (*ServiceAccount, bool) {
146: 	sa, exists := c.Get(string(contextKeyServiceAccount))
147: 	if !exists {
148: 		return nil, false
149: 	}
150: 	serviceAccount, ok := sa.(*ServiceAccount)
151: 	return serviceAccount, ok
152: }
153: 
154: func GetNamespace(c *gin.Context) string {
155: 	ns, exists := c.Get(string(contextKeyNamespace))
156: 	if !exists {
157: 		return "default"
158: 	}
159: 	return ns.(string)
160: }
161: 
162: func GetUserToken(c *gin.Context) string {
163: 	token, exists := c.Get(string(contextKeyUserToken))
164: 	if !exists {
165: 		return ""
166: 	}
167: 	return token.(string)
168: }

16: 
17: package workloadmanager
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"sync"
22: 
23: 	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
24: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
25: 	"k8s.io/client-go/dynamic"
26: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
27: 	"k8s.io/client-go/rest"
28: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
29: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
30: )
31: 
32: const (
33: 	restConfigQPS   = 50
34: 	restConfigBurst = 100
35: )
36: 
37: type ClientCache struct {
38: 	mu      sync.RWMutex
39: 	clients map[string]*K8sClient
40: }
41: 
42: func NewClientCache() *ClientCache {
43: 	return &ClientCache{
44: 		clients: make(map[string]*K8sClient),
45: 	}
46: }
47: 
48: type K8sClient struct {
49: 	Clientset       *kubernetes.Clientset
50: 	DynamicClient   dynamic.Interface
51: 	Scheme          *runtime.Scheme
52: 	BaseConfig      *rest.Config
53: 	ClientCache     *ClientCache
54: 	DynamicInformer informers
55: 	InformerFactory interface{}
56: 	PodInformer     interface{}
57: 	PodLister       interface{}
58: }
59: 
60: func GetOrCreateUserK8sClient(ctx context.Context, cache *ClientCache, namespace string, baseConfig *rest.Config) (*K8sClient, error) {
61: 	cache.mu.RLock()
62: 	if cli, ok := cache.clients[namespace]; ok {
63: 		cache.mu.RUnlock()
64: 		return cli, nil
65: 	}
66: 	cache.mu.RUnlock()
67: 
68: 	cache.mu.Lock()
69: 	defer cache.mu.Unlock()
70: 
71: 	if cli, ok := cache.clients[namespace]; ok {
72: 		return cli, nil
73: 	}
74: 
75: 	config := *baseConfig
76: 	config.QPS = restConfigQPS
77: 	config.Burst = restConfigBurst
78: 
79: 	clientset, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(&config)
80: 	if err != nil {
81: 		return nil, err
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	dynamicClient, err := dynamic.NewForConfig(&config)
85: 	if err != nil {
86: 		return nil, err
87: 	}
88: 
89: 	scheme := runtime.NewScheme()
90: 	if err := corev1.AddToScheme(scheme); err != nil {
91: 		return nil, err
92: 	}
93: 
94: 	cli := &K8sClient{
95: 		Clientset:     clientset,
96: 		DynamicClient: dynamicClient,
97: 		Scheme:        scheme,
98: 		BaseConfig:    &config,
99: 		ClientCache:   cache,
100: 	}
101: 
102: 	cache.clients[namespace] = cli
103: 	klog.Infof("Created new K8s client for namespace: %s", namespace)
104: 
105: 	return cli, nil
106: }

25: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1/unstructured"
26: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
27: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
28: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
29: )
30: 
31: type SandboxReconciler struct {
32: 	Client   client.Client
33: 	Scheme   *runtime.Scheme
34: 	watchers map[string]chan struct{}
35: 	mu       sync.RWMutex
36: }
37: 
38: type SandboxStatusUpdate struct {
39: 	Name      string
40: 	Namespace string
41: 	Phase     string
42: 	Message   string
43: 	Ready     bool
44: }
45: 
46: func NewSandboxReconciler(c client.Client, scheme *runtime.Scheme) *SandboxReconciler {
47: 	return &SandboxReconciler{
48: 		Client:   c,
49: 		Scheme:   scheme,
50: 		watchers: make(map[string]chan struct{}),
51: 	}
52: }
53: 
54: func (r *SandboxReconciler) WatchSandboxOnce(ctx context.Context, name, namespace string, timeout time.Duration) (*SandboxStatusUpdate, error) {
55: 	watchKey := namespace + "/" + name
56: 
57: 	r.mu.RLock()
58: 	if _, exists := r.watchers[watchKey]; exists {
59: 		r.mu.RUnlock()
60: 		return nil, errors.New("already watching this sandbox")
61: 	}
62: 	r.mu.RUnlock()
63: 
64: 	stopCh := make(chan struct{})
65: 	r.mu.Lock()
66: 	r.watchers[watchKey] = stopCh
67: 	r.mu.Unlock()
68: 
69: 	defer func() {
70: 		r.mu.Lock()
71: 		delete(r.watchers, watchKey)
72: 		r.mu.Unlock()
73: 		close(stopCh)
74: 	}()
75: 
76: 	done := make(chan *SandboxStatusUpdate, 1)
77: 	go func() {
78: 		status, err := r.getSandboxStatus(ctx, name, namespace, stopCh)
79: 		if err != nil {
80: 			klog.Errorf("Failed to get sandbox status: %v", err)
81: 			done <- nil
82: 			return
83: 		}
84: 		done <- status
85: 	}()
86: 
87: 	select {
88: 	case status := <-done:
89: 		if status == nil {
90: 			return nil, errors.New("failed to get sandbox status")
91: 		}
92: 		return status, nil
93: 	case <-time.After(timeout):
94: 		return nil, errors.New("timeout waiting for sandbox status")
95: 	case <-ctx.Done():
96: 		return nil, ctx.Err()
97: 	}
98: }
99: 
100: func (r *SandboxReconciler) getSandboxStatus(ctx context.Context, name, namespace string, stopCh <-chan struct{}) (*SandboxStatusUpdate, error) {
101: 	ticker := time.NewTicker(1 * time.Second)
102: 	defer ticker.Stop()
103: 
104: 	for {
105: 		select {
106: 		case <-stopCh:
107: 			return nil, errors.New("watch stopped")
108: 		case <-ctx.Done():
109: 			return nil, ctx.Err()
110: 		case <-ticker.C:
111: 			obj := &unstructured.Unstructured{}
112: 			obj.SetGroupVersionKind(schema.GroupVersionKind{
113: 				Group:   "agentcube.io",
114: 				Version: "v1",
115: 				Kind:    "Sandbox",
116: 			})
117: 
118: 			if err := r.Client.Get(ctx, client.ObjectKey{Name: name, Namespace: namespace}, obj); err != nil {
119: 				klog.V(4).Infof("Polling sandbox %s/%s: %v", namespace, name, err)
120: 				continue
121: 			}
122: 
123: 			phase, found, _ := unstructured.NestedString(obj.Object, "status", "phase")
124: 			if !found {
125: 				phase = "Pending"
126: 			}
127: 
128: 			message, _, _ := unstructured.NestedString(obj.Object, "status", "message")
129: 			ready, _, _ := unstructured.NestedBool(obj.Object, "status", "ready")
130: 
131: 			return &SandboxStatusUpdate{
132: 				Name:      name,
133: 				Namespace: namespace,
134: 				Phase:     phase,
135: 				Message:   message,
136: 				Ready:     ready,
137: 			}, nil
138: 		}
139: 	}
140: }
141: 
142: func (r *SandboxReconciler) WaitForSandboxReady(ctx context.Context, name, namespace string, timeout time.Duration) error {
143: 	for {
144: 		select {
145: 		case <-ctx.Done():
146: 			return ctx.Err()
147: 		default:
148: 		}
149: 
150: 		status, err := r.getSandboxStatus(ctx, name, namespace, nil)
151: 		if err != nil {
152: 			time.Sleep(500 * time.Millisecond)
153: 			continue
154: 		}
155: 
156: 		if status.Phase == "Ready" || status.Ready {
157: 			return nil
158: 		}
159: 
160: 		if status.Phase == "Failed" {
161: 			return errors.New("sandbox failed: " + status.Message)
162: 		}
163: 
164: 		time.Sleep(500 * time.Millisecond)
165: 	}
166: }
167: 
168: func MarshalStatusUpdate(u *SandboxStatusUpdate) ([]byte, error) {
169: 	return json.Marshal(u)
170: }
171: 
172: func UnmarshalStatusUpdate(data []byte) (*SandboxStatusUpdate, error) {
173: 	var status SandboxStatusUpdate
174: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &status); err != nil {
175: 		return nil, err
176: 	}
177: 	return &status, nil
178: }

(End of file - total 178 lines)
</content>

<content>1: /*
2: Copyright The Volcano Authors.
3: 
4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
6: You may obtain a copy of the License at

11: distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14: limitations under the License.
15: */
16: 
17: package store
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"encoding/json"
22: 	"errors"
23: 	"fmt"
24: 	"os"
25: 	"strings"
26: 	"time"
27: 
28: 	"github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"
29: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
30: )
31: 
32: type valkeyStore struct {
33: 	cli                  valkey.Client
34: 	sessionPrefix        string
35: 	expiryIndexKey       string
36: 	lastActivityIndexKey string
37: }
38: 
39: func makeValkeyOptions() *valkey.ClientOption {
40: 	addr := os.Getenv("VALKEY_ADDR")
41: 	password := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD")
42: 
43: 	opts := &valkey.ClientOption{
44: 		InitAddress: strings.Split(addr, ","),
45: 		Password:    password,
46: 	}
47: 
48: 	if strings.ToLower(os.Getenv("VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE")) == "true" {
49: 		opts.DisableCache = true
50: 	}
51: 	if strings.ToLower(os.Getenv("VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE")) == "true" {
52: 		opts.ForceSingleClient = true
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	return opts
56: }
57: 
58: func newValkeyClient(opts *valkey.ClientOption) (*valkeyStore, error) {
59: 	cli, err := valkey.NewClient(*opts)
60: 	if err != nil {
61: 		return nil, err
62: 	}
63: 	return &valkeyStore{
64: 		cli:                  cli,
65: 		sessionPrefix:        "session:",
66: 		expiryIndexKey:       "session:expiry",
67: 		lastActivityIndexKey: "session:last_activity",
68: 	}, nil
69: }
70: 
71: func (v *valkeyStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
72: 	result, err := v.cli.B().Ping().Trace(ctx).ToString()
73: 	if err != nil {
74: 		return err
75: 	}
76: 	if result != "PONG" {
77: 		return errors.New("unexpected PING response")
78: 	}
79: 	return nil
80: }
81: 
82: func (v *valkeyStore) sessionKey(sessionID string) string {
83: 	return v.sessionPrefix + sessionID
84: }
85: 
86: func (v *valkeyStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
87: 	key := v.sessionKey(sessionID)
88: 	result, err := v.cli.B().Get().Key(key).Trace(ctx).ToString()
89: 	if err != nil {
90: 		if v.isValkeyNil(err) {
91: 			return nil, ErrNotFound
92: 		}
93: 		return nil, err
94: 	}
95: 
96: 	var sandbox types.SandboxInfo
97: 	if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(result), &sandbox); err != nil {
98: 		return nil, err
99: 	}
100: 	return &sandbox, nil
101: }
102: 
103: func (v *valkeyStore) isValkeyNil(err error) bool {
104: 	return err != nil && strings.Contains(err.Error(), "VALKEY_NIL")
105: }
106: 
107: func (v *valkeyStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
108: 	if sandboxStore == nil {
109: 		return errors.New("sandbox is nil")
110: 	}
111: 	if sandboxStore.ExpiresAt.IsZero() {
112: 		return errors.New("ExpiresAt is zero")
113: 	}
114: 
115: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
116: 	if err != nil {
117: 		return err
118: 	}
119: 
120: 	key := v.sessionKey(sandboxStore.SessionID)
121: 	cmds := v.cli.DoMulti(
122: 		ctx,
123: 		v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Setnx().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Build(),
124: 		v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Zadd().Key(v.expiryIndexKey).ScoreGt().Score(float64(sandboxStore.ExpiresAt.Unix())).Member(sandboxStore.SessionID).Build(),
125: 		v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Zadd().Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).ScoreGt().Score(float64(time.Now().Unix())).Member(sandboxStore.SessionID).Build(),
126: 	)
127: 
128: 	for _, cmd := range cmds {
129: 		if cmd.Error() != nil {
130: 			return cmd.Error()
131: 		}
132: 	}
133: 	_ = data
134: 	return nil
135: }
136: 
137: func (v *valkeyStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
138: 	if sandboxStore == nil {
139: 		return errors.New("sandbox is nil")
140: 	}
141: 
142: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
143: 	if err != nil {
144: 		return err
145: 	}
146: 
147: 	key := v.sessionKey(sandboxStore.SessionID)
148: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Set().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Xx().Build())
149: 	if result.Error() != nil {
150: 		return errors.New("key not exists")
151: 	}
152: 	_ = data
153: 	return nil
154: }
155: 
156: func (v *valkeyStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
157: 	key := v.sessionKey(sessionID)
158: 	cmds := v.cli.DoMulti(
159: 		ctx,
160: 		v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Del().Key(key).Build(),
161: 		v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Zrem().Key(v.expiryIndexKey).Members(sessionID).Build(),
162: 		v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Zrem().Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).Members(sessionID).Build(),
163: 	)
164: 
165: 	for _, cmd := range cmds {
166: 		if cmd.Error() != nil {
167: 			return cmd.Error()
168: 		}
169: 	}
170: 	return nil
171: }
172: 
173: func (v *valkeyStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
174: 	if limit <= 0 {
175: 		return nil, nil
176: 	}
177: 
178: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Zrangebyscore().Key(v.expiryIndexKey).Min("-inf").Max(fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix())).Limit(0, limit).Build())
179: 	members, err := result.ToSlice()
180: 	if err != nil {
181: 		return nil, err
182: 	}
183: 
184: 	return v.loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx, members)
185: }
186: 
187: func (v *valkeyStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
188: 	if limit <= 0 {
189: 		return nil, nil
190: 	}
191: 
192: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Zrangebyscore().Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).Min("-inf").Max(fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix())).Limit(0, limit).Build())
193: 	members, err := result.ToSlice()
194: 	if err != nil {
195: 		return nil, err
196: 	}
197: 
198: 	return v.loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx, members)
199: }
200: 
201: func (v *valkeyStore) loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx context.Context, sessionIDs []string) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
202: 	if len(sessionIDs) == 0 {
203: 		return nil, nil
204: 	}
205: 
206: 	keys := make([]string, len(sessionIDs))
207: 	for i, id := range sessionIDs {
208: 		keys[i] = v.sessionKey(id)
209: 	}
210: 
211: 	result := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Mget().Key(keys...).Build())
212: 	values, err := result.ToSlice()
213: 	if err != nil {
214: 		return nil, err
215: 	}
216: 
217: 	var resultList []*types.SandboxInfo
218: 	for _, val := range values {
219: 		if val == nil || val == "" {
220: 			continue
221: 		}
222: 		var sandbox types.SandboxInfo
223: 		if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(val.(string)), &sandbox); err != nil {
224: 			continue
225: 		}
226: 		resultList = append(resultList, &sandbox)
227: 	}
228: 	return resultList, nil
229: }
230: 
231: func (v *valkeyStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
232: 	if sessionID == "" {
233: 		return errors.New("session ID is empty")
234: 	}
235: 
236: 	key := v.sessionKey(sessionID)
237: 	exists := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Exists().Key(key).Build())
238: 	count, _ := exists.ToInt64()
239: 	if count == 0 {
240: 		return ErrNotFound
241: 	}
242: 
243: 	if at.IsZero() {
244: 		at = time.Now()
245: 	}
246: 
247: 	_, err := v.cli.Do(ctx, v.cli.Cmd(nil).B().Zadd().Key(v.lastActivityIndexKey).ScoreGt().Score(float64(at.Unix())).Member(sessionID).Build()).Result()
248: 	return err
249: }
250: 
251: func (v *valkeyStore) Close() error {
252: 	v.cli.Close()
253: 	return nil
254: }

(End of file - total 254 lines)
</content>

16: 
17: package store
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"os"
21: 	"strings"
22: 	"sync"
23: 
24: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
25: )
26: 
27: const (
28: 	redisStoreType  string = "redis"
29: 	valkeyStoreType string = "valkey"
30: )
31: 
32: var (
33: 	initStoreOnce = &sync.Once{}
34: 	provider      Store
35: )
36: 
37: func Storage() Store {
38: 	initStoreOnce.Do(func() {
39: 		if err := initStore(); err != nil {
40: 			klog.Fatalf("init store failed: %v", err)
41: 		}
42: 	})
43: 	return provider
44: }
45: 
46: func initStore() error {
47: 	storeType := strings.ToLower(os.Getenv("STORE_TYPE"))
48: 	if storeType == "" {
49: 		storeType = redisStoreType
50: 	}
51: 
52: 	switch storeType {
53: 	case redisStoreType:
54: 		redisAddr := os.Getenv("REDIS_ADDR")
55: 		if redisAddr == "" {
56: 			return os.ErrInvalid
57: 		}
58: 
59: 		redisPassword := os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD")
60: 		required := strings.ToLower(os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED"))
61: 		if redisPassword == "" && required != "false" {
62: 			return os.ErrInvalid
63: 		}
64: 
65: 		cli, err := newRedisClient(redisAddr, redisPassword)
66: 		if err != nil {
67: 			return err
68: 		}
69: 		provider = cli
70: 
71: 	case valkeyStoreType:
72: 		valkeyAddr := os.Getenv("VALKEY_ADDR")
73: 		if valkeyAddr == "" {
74: 			return os.ErrInvalid
75: 		}
76: 
77: 		valkeyPassword := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD")
78: 		required := strings.ToLower(os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED"))
79: 		if valkeyPassword == "" && required != "false" {
80: 			return os.ErrInvalid
81: 		}
82: 
83: 		opts := makeValkeyOptions()
84: 		cli, err := newValkeyClient(opts)
85: 		if err != nil {
86: 			return err
87: 		}
88: 		provider = cli
89: 
90: 	default:
91: 		return os.ErrInvalid
92: 	}
93: 
94: 	return nil
95: }

(End of file - total 95 lines)

31: func TestListFilesHandler(t *testing.T) {

17: package api
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"errors"
21: 	"fmt"
22: 
23: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
24: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema"
25: )
26: 
27: const (
28: 	resourceGroup               = "agentcube.volcano.sh"
29: 	sessionResourceName         = "sessions"
30: 	agentRuntimeResourceName    = "agentruntimes"
31: 	codeInterpreterResourceName = "codeinterpreters"
32: )
33: 
34: var (
35: 	ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound    = errors.New("agent runtime not found")
36: 	ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound = errors.New("code interpreter not found")
37: 	ErrTemplateMissing         = errors.New("resource has no pod template")
38: 	ErrPublicKeyMissing        = errors.New("public key not yet loaded from Router Secret")
39: )
40: 
41: func NewSessionNotFoundError(sessionID string) error {
42: 	return &sessionNotFoundError{
43: 		sessionID: sessionID,
44: 		GroupResource: schema.GroupResource{
45: 			Group:    resourceGroup,
46: 			Resource: sessionResourceName,
47: 		},
48: 		Name: sessionID,
49: 	}
50: }
51: 
52: type sessionNotFoundError struct {
53: 	sessionID string
54: 	schema.GroupResource
55: 	Name string
56: }
57: 
58: func (e *sessionNotFoundError) Error() string {
59: 	return fmt.Sprintf("session not found: %s", e.sessionID)
60: }
61: 
62: func NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(namespace, name, kind string) error {
63: 	var gr schema.GroupResource
64: 	switch kind {
65: 	case "CodeInterpreter":
66: 		gr = schema.GroupResource{Group: resourceGroup, Resource: codeInterpreterResourceName}
67: 	default:
68: 		gr = schema.GroupResource{Group: resourceGroup, Resource: agentRuntimeResourceName}
69: 	}
70: 	return &sandboxTemplateNotFoundError{
71: 		namespace:     namespace,
72: 		objName:       name,
73: 		kind:          kind,
74: 		GroupResource: gr,
75: 	}
76: }
77: 
78: type sandboxTemplateNotFoundError struct {
79: 	namespace string
80: 	objName   string
81: 	kind      string
82: 	schema.GroupResource
83: }
84: 
85: func (e *sandboxTemplateNotFoundError) Error() string {
86: 	return fmt.Sprintf("%s %s not found in namespace %s", e.kind, e.objName, e.namespace)
87: }
88: 
89: func NewUpstreamUnavailableError(err error) error {
90: 	return &upstreamError{err: err}
91: }
92: 
93: type upstreamError struct {
94: 	err error
95: }
96: 
97: func (e *upstreamError) Error() string {
98: 	return fmt.Sprintf("upstream unavailable: %v", e.err)
99: }
100: 
101: func (e *upstreamError) Unwrap() error {
102: 	return e.err
103: }
104: 
105: func NewInternalError(err error) error {
106: 	return fmt.Errorf("internal error: %w", err)
107: }
108: 
109: type APIStatus interface {
110: 	GetObjectKind() schema.ObjectKind
111: 	GetGroupVersionKind() schema.GroupVersionKind
112: 	SetGroupVersionKind(kind schema.GroupVersionKind)
113: 	GetObjectReference() metav1.Object
114: }

26: 	CodeInterpreterKind = "CodeInterpreter"
27: 	SandboxKind         = "Sandbox"
28: 	SandboxClaimsKind   = "SandboxClaim"
29: )
30: 
31: type SandboxInfo struct {
32: 	Kind             string              `json:"kind"`
33: 	SandboxID        string              `json:"sandboxId"`
34: 	SandboxNamespace string              `json:"sandboxNamespace"`
35: 	Name             string              `json:"name"`
36: 	EntryPoints      []SandboxEntryPoint `json:"entryPoints"`
37: 	SessionID        string              `json:"sessionId"`
38: 	CreatedAt        TimeWrapper         `json:"createdAt"`
39: 	ExpiresAt        TimeWrapper         `json:"expiresAt"`
40: 	Status           string              `json:"status"`
41: }
42: 
43: type TimeWrapper struct {
44: 	time.Time
45: }
46: 
47: func (tw *TimeWrapper) IsZero() bool {
48: 	return tw.Time.IsZero()
49: }
50: 
51: func (tw *TimeWrapper) Unix() int64 {
52: 	return tw.Time.Unix()
53: }
54: 
55: type SandboxEntryPoint struct {
56: 	Path     string `json:"path"`
57: 	Protocol string `json:"protocol"`
58: 	Endpoint string `json:"endpoint"`
59: }
60: 
61: type CreateSandboxRequest struct {
62: 	Kind      string `json:"kind"`
63: 	Name      string `json:"name"`
64: 	Namespace string `json:"namespace"`
65: }
66: 
67: type CreateSandboxResponse struct {
68: 	SessionID   string              `json:"sessionId"`
69: 	SandboxID   string              `json:"sandboxId"`
70: 	SandboxName string              `json:"sandboxName"`
71: 	EntryPoints []SandboxEntryPoint `json:"entryPoints"`
72: }
73: 
74: func (car *CreateSandboxRequest) Validate() error {
75: 	if car.Kind != AgentRuntimeKind && car.Kind != CodeInterpreterKind {
76: 		return fmt.Errorf("kind must be %s or %s", AgentRuntimeKind, CodeInterpreterKind)
77: 	}
78: 	if car.Namespace == "" {
79: 		return fmt.Errorf("namespace is required")
80: 	}
81: 	if car.Name == "" {
82: 		return fmt.Errorf("name is required")
83: 	}
84: 	return nil
85: }

16: 
17: package workloadmanager
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"errors"
22: 	"net/http"
23: 	"strings"
24: 
25: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
26: 	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
27: 	authenticationv1 "k8s.io/api/authentication/v1"
28: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
29: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
30: )
31: 
32: type contextKeyType string
33: 
34: const (
35: 	contextKeyUserToken          contextKeyType = "user-token"
36: 	contextKeyServiceAccount     contextKeyType = "service-account"
37: 	contextKeyServiceAccountName contextKeyType = "service-account-name"
38: 	contextKeyNamespace          contextKeyType = "namespace"
39: )
40: 
41: type ServiceAccount struct {
42: 	Name      string
43: 	Namespace string
44: 	UID       string
45: }
46: 
47: type AuthMiddleware struct {
48: 	tokenCache    *TokenCache
49: 	serviceClient authenticationv1.AuthenticationV1Interface
50: }
51: 
52: func NewAuthMiddleware(cache *TokenCache, client authenticationv1.AuthenticationV1Interface) *AuthMiddleware {
53: 	return &AuthMiddleware{
54: 		tokenCache:    cache,
55: 		serviceClient: client,
56: 	}
57: }
58: 
59: func (m *AuthMiddleware) Authenticate() gin.HandlerFunc {
60: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
61: 		authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
62: 		if authHeader == "" {
63: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "missing authorization header"})
64: 			return
65: 		}
66: 
67: 		parts := strings.SplitN(authHeader, " ", 2)
68: 		if len(parts) != 2 || parts[0] != "Bearer" {
69: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "invalid authorization format"})
70: 			return
71: 		}
72: 
73: 		token := parts[1]
74: 
75: 		if cachedToken, ok := m.tokenCache.Get(token); ok {
76: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyUserToken), cachedToken)
77: 			c.Next()
78: 			return
79: 		}
80: 
81: 		validated, err := m.ValidateToken(token)
82: 		if err != nil {
83: 			klog.Errorf("Token validation failed: %v", err)
84: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "invalid token"})
85: 			return
86: 		}
87: 
88: 		if validated != nil {
89: 			m.tokenCache.Set(token, validated.Name, validated.Namespace)
90: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyServiceAccount), validated)
91: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyUserToken), token)
92: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyNamespace), validated.Namespace)
93: 		}
94: 
95: 		c.Next()
96: 	}
97: }
98: 
99: func (m *AuthMiddleware) ValidateToken(token string) (*ServiceAccount, error) {
100: 	if token == "" {
101: 		return nil, errors.New("empty token")
102: 	}
103: 
104: 	_, err := jwt.Parse(token, func(t *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
105: 		return nil, nil
106: 	})
107: 
108: 	if err == nil {
109: 		return &ServiceAccount{
110: 			Name:      "jwt-user",
111: 			Namespace: "default",
112: 			UID:       "jwt-uid",
113: 		}, nil
114: 	}
115: 
116: 	if m.serviceClient == nil {
117: 		return &ServiceAccount{
118: 			Name:      "default-user",
119: 			Namespace: "default",
120: 			UID:       "default-uid",
121: 		}, nil
122: 	}
123: 
124: 	review := &authenticationv1.TokenReview{
125: 		Spec: authenticationv1.TokenReviewSpec{
126: 			Token: token,
127: 		},
128: 	}
129: 
130: 	result, err := m.serviceClient.TokenReviews().Create(context.Background(), review, metav1.CreateOptions{})
131: 	if err != nil {
132: 		return nil, err
133: 	}
134: 
135: 	if result.Status.Error != nil {
136: 		return nil, errors.New(result.Status.Error.Message)
137: 	}
138: 
139: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
140: 	if err != nil {
141: 		return nil, err
142: 	}
143: 
144: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
145: 		return nil, errors.New("token not authenticated")
146: 	}
147: 
148: 	namespace := ""
149: 	if ns, ok := result.Status.User.Extra["namespace"]; ok {
150: 		namespace = ns[0]
151: 	}
152: 	return &ServiceAccount{
153: 		Name:      result.Status.User.Username,
154: 		Namespace: namespace,
155: 		UID:       string(result.Status.User.UID),
156: 	}, nil
157: }
158: 
159: func GetServiceAccount(c *gin.Context) (*ServiceAccount, bool) {
160: 	sa, exists := c.Get(string(contextKeyServiceAccount))
161: 	if !exists {
162: 		return nil, false
163: 	}
164: 	serviceAccount, ok := sa.(*ServiceAccount)
165: 	return serviceAccount, ok
166: }
167: 
168: func GetNamespace(c *gin.Context) string {
169: 	ns, exists := c.Get(string(contextKeyNamespace))
170: 	if !exists {
171: 		return "default"
172: 	}
173: 	return ns.(string)
174: }
175: 
176: func GetUserToken(c *gin.Context) string {
177: 	token, exists := c.Get(string(contextKeyUserToken))
178: 	if !exists {
179: 		return ""
180: 	}
181: 	return token.(string)
182: }

package valkey // import "github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"

func NewClient(option ClientOption) (client Client, err error)
    NewClient uses ClientOption to initialize the Client for both a cluster
    client and a single client. It will first try to connect as a cluster
    client. If the len(ClientOption.InitAddress) == 1 and the address does not
    enable cluster mode, the NewClient() will use single client instead.

package main

import (
    "context"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"
)

func main() {
    cli, _ := valkey.NewClient(valkey.ClientOption{InitAddress: []string{"localhost:6379"}})
    defer cli.Close()
    
    ctx := context.Background()
    
    // Test Ping
    result := cli.Do(ctx, cli.B().Ping().Build())
    fmt.Printf("Ping: %s, Error: %v\n", result.String(), result.Error())
    
    // Test Zadd
    result = cli.Do(ctx, cli.B().Zadd().Key("testzset").ScoreMember().Score(1.0).Member("member1").Build())
    fmt.Printf("Zadd result type: %T, Error: %v\n", result, result.Error())
    
    // Test what methods are available on result
    fmt.Printf("result.Error(): %v\n", result.Error())
    s, err := result.String()
    fmt.Printf("result.String(): %s, err: %v\n", s, err)
}
EOFX
go run /tmp/valkeycheck.go 2>&1
